Each student requires |orig - target|\n// swaps with intermediate neighbors. If their relative order must flip, one of\n// those swaps is shared (they swap with each other), saving 1.\nghost function SwapCost(a: int, b: int, pa: int, pb: int): int\n{\n  Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (if OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb) then 1 else 0)\n}\n\n// There exist valid target positions that achieve exactly distance d\n// using at most x adjacent swaps\nghost predicate IsAchievable(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int, d: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n{\n  exists pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n ::\n    pa != pb && Abs(pa - pb) == d && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x\n}\n\n// d is the maximum distance achievable: it is achievable, and no reachable\n// configuration yields a greater distance\nghost predicate IsMaxDistance(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int, d: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n{\n  IsAchievable(n, x, a, b, d) &&\n  forall pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n ::\n    (pa != pb && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x) ==> Abs(pa - pb) <= d\n}\n\n// --- Implementation ---\n\nmethod TwoRivalStudents(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int) returns (distance: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n  ensures IsMaxDistance(n, x, a, b, distance)\n{\n  var la := a;\n  var lb := b;\n  var rx := x;\n  if la > lb {\n    var tmp := la;\n    la := lb;\n    lb := tmp;\n  }\n\n  ghost var oa := la;\n  ghost var ob := lb;\n\n  var da := if la - 1 < rx then la - 1 else rx;\n  la := la - da;\n  rx := rx - da;\n  var db := if n - lb < rx then n - lb else rx;\n  lb := lb + db;\n  distance := lb - la;\n\n  // Key properties of the algorithm\n  assert 1 <= la <= n && 1 <= lb <= n && la < lb;\n  assert da >= 0 && db >= 0 && da + db <= x;\n  assert distance == ob - oa + da + db;\n\n  // --- Prove IsAchievable ---\n  if a < b {\n    assert oa == a && ob == b;\n    assert la == a - da && lb == b + db;\n    assert a - la == da;\n    assert Abs(a - la) == da;\n    assert lb - b == db;\n    assert Abs(b - lb) == db;\n    assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, la, lb);\n    assert SwapCost(a, b, la, lb) == da + db;\n    assert la != lb;\n    assert Abs(la - lb) == distance;\n  } else {\n    assert a > b;\n    assert oa == b && ob == a;\n    assert lb == a + db && la == b - da;\n    assert a - lb == -db;\n    assert Abs(a - lb) == db;\n    assert b - la == da;\n    assert Abs(b - la) == da;\n    assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, lb, la);\n    assert SwapCost(a, b, lb, la) == da + db;\n    assert lb != la;\n    assert Abs(lb - la) == distance;\n  }\n  assert IsAchievable(n, x, a, b, distance);\n\n  // --- Prove upper bound ---\n  forall pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n && pa != pb && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x\n    ensures Abs(pa - pb) <= distance\n  {\n    if da + db < x {\n      // Budget not exhausted => hit both boundaries: la == 1, lb == n\n      assert da == oa - 1;\n      assert la == 1;\n      assert db == n - ob;\n      assert lb == n;\n      assert distance == n - 1;\n      // |pa - pb| <= n - 1 since 1 <= pa, pb <= n\n    } else {\n      // Full budget used\n      assert da + db == x;\n      if a < b {\n        assert distance == (b - a) + x;\n        if pa <= pb {\n          // No order flip\n          assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert a - pa <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert pb - b <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= Abs(a - pa) + (b - a) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= x + (b - a);\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pb - pa;\n        } else {\n          // Order flipped: pa > pb\n          assert OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - 1;\n          assert pa - a <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert b - pb <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (b - a);\n          assert pa - pb <= x + 1 - (b - a);\n          assert pa - pb <= x;\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pa - pb;\n          assert x <= distance;\n        }\n      } else {\n        assert a > b;\n        assert distance == (a - b) + x;\n        if pa >= pb {\n          // No order flip\n          assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - a <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert b - pb <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= Abs(a - pa) + (a - b) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= x + (a - b);\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pa - pb;\n        } else {\n          // Order flipped: pa < pb\n          assert OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - 1;\n          assert a - pa <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert pb - b <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (a - b);\n          assert pb - pa <= x + 1 - (a - b);\n          assert pb - pa <= x;\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pb - pa;\n          assert x <= distance;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":10109,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":10109},"output_tokens":9,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ad0e5e00-34c3-4a4e-b98d-b6dd69740385","uuid":"2c16c068-f639-41d1-ba0e-9769d289ba4b"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"2b69fca9-1b90-4410-8945-ab8cf7689f57","session_id":"ad0e5e00-34c3-4a4e-b98d-b6dd69740385"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0121ELkn6sS8Ns43YbrMe1ud","type":"tool_result","content":"File created successfully at: /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0085_1257_A/verified.dfy"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ad0e5e00-34c3-4a4e-b98d-b6dd69740385","uuid":"db84936e-1c03-4018-ada8-4d669ca49abf","timestamp":"2026-03-17T21:15:01.984Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"create","filePath":"/Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0085_1257_A/verified.dfy","content":"// --- Specification ---\n\nghost function Abs(x: int): int\n{\n  if x >= 0 then x else -x\n}\n\n// Whether the relative order of two students flips from (a,b) to (pa,pb)\nghost predicate OrderFlipped(a: int, b: int, pa: int, pb: int)\n{\n  (a < b && pa > pb) || (a > b && pa < pb)\n}\n\n// Minimum adjacent swaps needed to move two specific students from positions\n// (a, b) to positions (pa, pb) in a row. Each student requires |orig - target|\n// swaps with intermediate neighbors. If their relative order must flip, one of\n// those swaps is shared (they swap with each other), saving 1.\nghost function SwapCost(a: int, b: int, pa: int, pb: int): int\n{\n  Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (if OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb) then 1 else 0)\n}\n\n// There exist valid target positions that achieve exactly distance d\n// using at most x adjacent swaps\nghost predicate IsAchievable(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int, d: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n{\n  exists pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n ::\n    pa != pb && Abs(pa - pb) == d && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x\n}\n\n// d is the maximum distance achievable: it is achievable, and no reachable\n// configuration yields a greater distance\nghost predicate IsMaxDistance(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int, d: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n{\n  IsAchievable(n, x, a, b, d) &&\n  forall pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n ::\n    (pa != pb && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x) ==> Abs(pa - pb) <= d\n}\n\n// --- Implementation ---\n\nmethod TwoRivalStudents(n: int, x: int, a: int, b: int) returns (distance: int)\n  requires n >= 2 && 1 <= a <= n && 1 <= b <= n && a != b && x >= 0\n  ensures IsMaxDistance(n, x, a, b, distance)\n{\n  var la := a;\n  var lb := b;\n  var rx := x;\n  if la > lb {\n    var tmp := la;\n    la := lb;\n    lb := tmp;\n  }\n\n  ghost var oa := la;\n  ghost var ob := lb;\n\n  var da := if la - 1 < rx then la - 1 else rx;\n  la := la - da;\n  rx := rx - da;\n  var db := if n - lb < rx then n - lb else rx;\n  lb := lb + db;\n  distance := lb - la;\n\n  // Key properties of the algorithm\n  assert 1 <= la <= n && 1 <= lb <= n && la < lb;\n  assert da >= 0 && db >= 0 && da + db <= x;\n  assert distance == ob - oa + da + db;\n\n  // --- Prove IsAchievable ---\n  if a < b {\n    assert oa == a && ob == b;\n    assert la == a - da && lb == b + db;\n    assert a - la == da;\n    assert Abs(a - la) == da;\n    assert lb - b == db;\n    assert Abs(b - lb) == db;\n    assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, la, lb);\n    assert SwapCost(a, b, la, lb) == da + db;\n    assert la != lb;\n    assert Abs(la - lb) == distance;\n  } else {\n    assert a > b;\n    assert oa == b && ob == a;\n    assert lb == a + db && la == b - da;\n    assert a - lb == -db;\n    assert Abs(a - lb) == db;\n    assert b - la == da;\n    assert Abs(b - la) == da;\n    assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, lb, la);\n    assert SwapCost(a, b, lb, la) == da + db;\n    assert lb != la;\n    assert Abs(lb - la) == distance;\n  }\n  assert IsAchievable(n, x, a, b, distance);\n\n  // --- Prove upper bound ---\n  forall pa: int, pb: int | 1 <= pa <= n && 1 <= pb <= n && pa != pb && SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) <= x\n    ensures Abs(pa - pb) <= distance\n  {\n    if da + db < x {\n      // Budget not exhausted => hit both boundaries: la == 1, lb == n\n      assert da == oa - 1;\n      assert la == 1;\n      assert db == n - ob;\n      assert lb == n;\n      assert distance == n - 1;\n      // |pa - pb| <= n - 1 since 1 <= pa, pb <= n\n    } else {\n      // Full budget used\n      assert da + db == x;\n      if a < b {\n        assert distance == (b - a) + x;\n        if pa <= pb {\n          // No order flip\n          assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert a - pa <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert pb - b <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= Abs(a - pa) + (b - a) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= x + (b - a);\n          assert 1;\n          assert pa - a <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert b - pb <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (b - a);\n          assert pa - pb <= x + 1 - (b - a);\n    if pa >= pb {\n          // No order flip\n          assert !OrderFlipped(a, b, pa, pb);\n          assert SwapCost(a, b, pa, pb) == Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - a <= Abs(a - pa);\n          assert b - pb <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= Abs(a - pa) + (a - b) + Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pa - pb <= x + (a - b);\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pa - pb;\n Abs(a - pa);\n          assert pb - b <= Abs(b - pb);\n          assert pb - pa <= Abs(a - pa) + Abs(b - pb) - (a - b);\n          assert pb - pa <= x + 1 - (a - b);\n          assert pb - pa <= x;\n          assert Abs(pa - pb) == pb - pa;\n          assert x <= distance;\n        }\n      }\n    }\n
